title: Uncovering the complex genetics of human character.

assets.abstract: Human personality is 30-60% heritable according to twin and adoption studies. Hundreds of genetic variants are expected to influence its complex development, but few have been identified. We used a machine learning method for genome-wide association studies (GWAS) to uncover complex genotypic-phenotypic networks and environmental interactions. The Temperament and Character Inventory (TCI) measured the self-regulatory components of personality critical for health (i.e., the character traits of se

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.
